description: A scatter plot with a linear regression line showing displacement in millimetres over a 60-day period. The Y-axis is labelled "Displacement [mm]" and ranges from -30 mm to 10 mm. The X-axis is labelled "Time [days]" and ranges from 0 days to 60 days. Blue dots represent individual displacement measurements, which are scattered around a descending red linear trend line. At 0 days, the displacement values are around 0 mm to 1 mm, with the trend line starting near 0 mm. By 60 days, the displacement values are approximately -25 mm to -26 mm, and the trend line indicates a displacement of about -25 mm. The overall trend shows a linear decrease in displacement from positive to negative values over the observed time period. The chart is labelled with "(d)" in the bottom-middle.
